chunks.text: Stuart Russell contemplates AI's effect on our future - EECS at Berkeley CS Professor Stuart Russell is featured in a Voice of America article in which he discusses how developments in artificial intelligence may impact global manufacturing, agriculture, business services, the financial industry, health care, and weaponry. “If we are going to make systems that are going to be more intelligent than us, it’s absolutely essential for us to understand how to absolutely guarantee that they only do things that we are happy with,” he says. Categories Faculty Research View Open Faculty Positions
